seoTitle: Marlowe vs Marmong Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Marlowe and Marmong Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Marlowe vs Marmong Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Marlowe and Marmong Point.
heading: Marlowe vs Marmong Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marlowe, New South Wales and Marmong Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Marlowe has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Marmong Point (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Marlowe or Marmong Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marlowe has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Marmong Point scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marlowe scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Marmong Point scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marlowe or Marmong Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Marlowe has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
